timeline_title: Timeline of the Black Lives Matter Movement
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Black Lives Matter movement, from its origin after the killing of Trayvon Martin to the global protests and legal aftermath of the George Floyd case.

description: The killing of Trayvon Martin in Sanford, Florida, became the catalyst for the movement that would later take the name Black Lives Matter.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Black Lives Matter movement, from its origin after the killing of Trayvon Martin to the global protests and legal aftermath of the George Floyd case.

description: Zimmerman's acquittal in the shooting death of Trayvon Martin triggered grief and anger that helped spark a new wave of Black-led activism.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Black Lives Matter movement, from its origin after the killing of Trayvon Martin to the global protests and legal aftermath of the George Floyd case.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Black Lives Matter Movement

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Black Lives Matter movement, from its origin after the killing of Trayvon Martin to the global protests and legal aftermath of the George Floyd case.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Black Lives Matter movement, from its origin after the killing of Trayvon Martin to the global protests and legal aftermath of the George Floyd case.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush

description: Survey work in the Yukon helped define the region that would soon become the center of a major gold rush.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: North-West Mounted Police establish a stronger Yukon presence

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: Nearby creeks are rapidly claimed
description: Prospectors spread through nearby creeks, especially Eldorado, confirming the scale of the strike.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: Dawson emerges as the boomtown of the Klondike
description: Dawson quickly became the commercial and administrative hub of the rush.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: Steamer Excelsior reaches San Francisco with gold

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

description: Canadian officials required stampeders entering the Yukon to carry roughly a year's worth of provisions, reshaping the overland journey.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: White Pass and Yukon Route railway construction begins

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: The Yukon Territory is created
description: Canada created the Yukon Territory to administer the rapidly growing mining region.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: Stampeders launch boats from Lake Bennett
description: After hauling supplies over the passes, thousands built boats to descend the Yukon River toward Dawson.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

description: The boom transformed Dawson into one of the largest communities in western Canada for a brief period.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.
title: The railway reaches Whitehorse

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

description: Large-scale and capital-intensive methods increasingly replaced the earliest individual prospecting phase.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Klondike Gold Rush
timeline_description: Major milestones in the Klondike Gold Rush, from the discovery on Bonanza Creek to the rise and decline of Dawson and the end of placer mining.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea accedes to the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty
description: Pyongyang joined the NPT, formally entering the global non-proliferation regime while preserving major ambiguities about its program.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: Koreas sign the Joint Declaration on Denuclearization
description: North and South Korea agreed in principle not to test, manufacture, produce, receive, possess, store, deploy, or use nuclear weapons.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea signs an IAEA safeguards agreement
description: The agreement committed Pyongyang to inspections meant to verify its declared nuclear materials and facilities.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea announces intent to withdraw from the NPT
description: The announcement triggered the first major nuclear crisis surrounding North Korea.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: Jimmy Carter visits Pyongyang
description: Former U.S. president Jimmy Carter's visit helped open a path away from immediate crisis and toward negotiations.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: The Agreed Framework is signed
description: Washington and Pyongyang reached an accord to freeze parts of North Korea's plutonium program in exchange for energy assistance and other commitments.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: The uranium enrichment dispute erupts
description: The United States said North Korea had acknowledged a clandestine uranium-enrichment effort, accelerating the collapse of the Agreed Framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea withdraws from the NPT
description: Pyongyang became the first state to announce withdrawal from the treaty and carry it through.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: Six-Party Talks begin in Beijing
description: China, the United States, the two Koreas, Japan, and Russia opened a new diplomatic format to address the crisis.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: Six-Party Talks issue a Joint Statement
description: North Korea agreed in principle to abandon nuclear weapons and programs in return for security and energy-related steps.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea conducts its first nuclear test
description: The test confirmed North Korea's emergence as a nuclear-armed state in practice.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: A disablement agreement is reached
description: Six-party negotiators agreed on initial steps for shutdown and disablement in exchange for aid.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: Yongbyon cooling tower is demolished
description: The demolition became a visual symbol of partial disablement during negotiations, though it did not end the program.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea conducts its second nuclear test
description: The test deepened the crisis after the breakdown of earlier six-party arrangements.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: The Leap Day deal is announced
description: Washington and Pyongyang reached a short-lived agreement involving a moratorium and food assistance.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea conducts its third nuclear test
description: The test demonstrated continued weapons development despite sanctions and diplomatic pressure.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea conducts its fourth nuclear test
description: Pyongyang claimed the test involved a hydrogen bomb, though outside experts disputed the scale of that claim.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea conducts its fifth nuclear test
description: The second test of 2016 underscored the rapid pace of the program's development.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: North Korea conducts its sixth and largest nuclear test
description: The test marked the most powerful detonation yet attributed to the North Korean program.

timeline_title: Timeline of North Korea's Nuclear Program
timeline_description: Key milestones in North Korea's nuclear program, diplomacy, and weapons testing.
title: Kim Jong Un and Donald Trump meet in Singapore
description: The first summit between a sitting U.S. president and a North Korean leader brought the nuclear issue to the center of world diplomacy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs

timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The stone is reused in later building works
description: After the decline of hieroglyphic literacy, the stone was probably repurposed as construction material.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Napoleon invades Egypt

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The Rosetta Stone is discovered at Fort Julien

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The discovery is reported to scholars in Cairo
description: News of the find spread among the French scholarly establishment in Egypt, accelerating study and copying.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Early copies and prints circulate
description: Scholars created facsimiles and printed versions of the text, allowing wider European study even before the stone itself left Egypt.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The Capitulation of Alexandria transfers the stone to Britain
description: Under the terms of surrender, the French ceded the Rosetta Stone and other antiquities to British control.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The Rosetta Stone arrives in Britain
description: The stone was transported to Britain, where it soon became one of the most famous Egyptian objects in Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The stone goes on display at the British Museum
description: Public display gave the object extraordinary visibility and made it a centerpiece of Egyptian studies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The Greek text is translated and published more widely
description: Publication of the readable Greek section helped scholars compare the parallel texts and frame decipherment efforts.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Thomas Young begins major work on the stone
description: Young made important advances in understanding the demotic and hieroglyphic signs and their relation to names.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Young publishes results in Encyclopaedia Britannica
description: Young's work brought key partial breakthroughs into public scholarly circulation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Champollion announces the decipherment breakthrough
description: Jean-François Champollion's letter to Dacier marked the decisive step in reading Egyptian hieroglyphs.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Champollion publishes the Précis
description: His Précis du système hiéroglyphique set out the method and evidence behind the decipherment.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Champollion tests decipherment in Egypt
description: The Franco-Tuscan expedition allowed Champollion to compare inscriptions directly in Egypt, confirming the new system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Champollion dies
description: Champollion's early death came after he had laid the foundations of modern Egyptology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The stone is moved for wartime safety
description: During the First World War, the British Museum relocated the Rosetta Stone for protection.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: Conservation work reveals more of the stone's original appearance
description: Cleaning and conservation removed old coatings and made the stone's granodiorite surface more visible.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: A full-size replica is sent to Egypt
description: A replica of the Rosetta Stone was placed near Rashid, reconnecting the famous object with the town where it was found.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Rosetta Stone and the Decipherment of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
timeline_description: Key milestones in the creation, discovery, transfer, study, and decipherment of the Rosetta Stone.
title: The bicentenary of decipherment renews repatriation debate
description: Two hundred years after Champollion's breakthrough, public campaigns intensified calls for the stone's return to Egypt.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: Leeuwenhoek observes microorganisms from the human body
description: Antonie van Leeuwenhoek described microorganisms from dental plaque and other human samples, opening a long history of study of human-associated microbes.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: Theodor Escherich identifies Bacillus coli commune
description: Escherich's work on infant intestinal bacteria helped establish the study of the human gut microbiota.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: Élie Metchnikoff links microbes and human health
description: Metchnikoff popularized the idea that beneficial microbes could influence aging and health, shaping later probiotic thinking.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: Germ-free animal research becomes a practical platform
description: Work associated with James Reyniers and others made controlled study of host-microbe relationships increasingly feasible.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: 16S rRNA phylogeny transforms microbial classification
description: Carl Woese and George Fox introduced a molecular framework that later became central to microbiome analysis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: Joshua Lederberg popularizes the term human microbiome
description: Lederberg's usage helped crystallize the concept of the human microbiome in modern biomedical research.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: The first human gut metagenome is published
description: A landmark metagenomic study showed how sequencing could profile the gene content of the human gut microbial community.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: The NIH launches the Human Microbiome Project
description: The HMP made the human microbiome a major coordinated national research program.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: Human Microbiome Project phase 1 begins large-scale sampling
description: HMP infrastructure and sampling protocols created a common foundation for large, standardized microbiome datasets.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: MetaHIT publishes a human gut gene catalog
description: European researchers released a large catalog of gut microbial genes, demonstrating the scale of the intestinal microbiome.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: Enterotypes are proposed
description: A prominent study suggested broad recurrent gut community patterns, intensifying debate about how to classify human microbiomes.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
timeline_description: Major milestones in the scientific understanding of the human microbiome and its medical applications.
title: The Human Microbiome Project publishes a reference map

timeline_title: Timeline of the Human Microbiome in Science and Medicine
